title: onosma mozaffariani
intro: Onosma mozaffariani is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Mozaffarian's onosma or goldenspike. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and gallbladder disorders, due to its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. Studies have shown that Onosma mozaffariani extracts exhibit significant health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and antimicrobial activities, which can help protect against various diseases and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and optimal preparations.
